title: News Feeds | Beehive.govt.nz
content:
### Get the latest news from Beehive.govt.nz delivered to your device or inbox.
Use the buttons below to filter the list of feeds by site-wide updates, by minister, or by portfolio.
- RSS All Site Updates
Beehive.govt.nz’s RSS feeds let you receive this website’s content using any compatible web browser, email app, or dedicated RSS feed reader app. RSS feeds deliver website content to you as soon as it’s published.
You can use the feeds above to subscribe to all the content on the website, to content of a particular type, or to content by a particular minister or from a particular portfolio.

### How do I subscribe to a feed?
You’ll need a feed reader to subscribe to Beehive.govt.nz’s RSS feeds. Some browsers, like Mozilla Firefox, have built-in RSS feed reading functionality. Some email apps, like Microsoft Outlook, also have RSS feed reading functionality. There are also many standalone apps accessible online, through your desktop computer, or on your mobile device, which you can use to subscribe to this website’s feeds.
Your feed reader should tell you how to subscribe to this website’s RSS feeds. For most apps you’ll have to copy the RSS feed’s URL into the app. For example, Beehive.govt.nz’s feed for all the content on the website can be found at https://www.beehive.govt.nz/rss.xml .
